title: Silver Spoon Set
writer: Ennio De Concini, Francesco Maselli, Ageo Savioli
actors: Claudia Cardinale, Gérard Blain, Anna Maria Ferrero
plot: An acid portrait of Italian youth at the time, I DELFINI follows a dreary season of discontent and viciousness in the lives of a thoroughly unpleasant group of mostly rich youngsters in a small Adriatic coast city.
